page_content:
Prerequisite: GVPT241.

Restriction: Must be in Government & Politics program.

Additional Information: Permission of department required for repeat.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 729

GVPT449 Seminar in Political Philosophy (3 Credits)

Reading, writing, and research on topics in political philosophy. Both substantive issues and methodological approaches will be considered. Prerequisite: GVPT241.
